idea-plugin.name: Screenshot Compare
idea-plugin.description:
Screenshot Compare helps Android and Kotlin developers review screenshot-test changes directly in Android Studio or IntelliJ-based IDEs, without leaving the editor.

Open the tool window for the screen you are editing and it lists the matching screenshot goldens, then compares the committed git HEAD version against your working copy or generated test output — in four modes: side-by-side (2-up), swipe, onion skin, and a pixel-diff heatmap.

It is tool-agnostic and works with PNG outputs from Roborazzi, Paparazzi, Compose Preview Screenshot Testing, Shot, and similar screenshot-test tools — just point it at the golden directory.

  • Match screenshot goldens by screen, preview, test, class, or file name.
  • Compare Git HEAD with working-copy goldens.
  • Compare Git HEAD with generated test output such as _actual.png files.
  • Configure golden directories, generated-output directories, and the generated-file regex per project.
  • Review changes in side-by-side, swipe, onion-skin, and pixel-diff modes.
  • Zoom (Fit / 50–400%) and scroll large screenshots.
  • When a golden is identical to the selected source, the comparison is skipped and a single preview is shown.

Works with IntelliJ Platform 2024.1+ (build 241+) through build 254.
